title: Minecraft icons
description: This pack will now only be updated within "Miner's Icons" and is discontinued as a standalone pack.
body:
![Image failed to load ) :](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9009a2f450a23b6ba43475e41abc51101606cf0.png)<details>
<summary>
You should know
</summary>
I did not use any base resource packs to make this.
If you like this then go check out my other pack that is meant for Cobblemon, Cobblemon icons.
</details>
<details>
<summary>
What this pack does
</summary>
Adds good looking icons in Minecraft for xaero's minimap.
</details>
<details>
<summary>
Supported mods
</summary>
It is meant for Minecraft, but I might add support for some mods that add variants, such as "more mob variants" btw its coming.
</details>
<details>
<summary>
Icons in the pack (may not be accurate to current public version)
</summary>
All axolotls, Warden, Sniffer, Vex, Pillager, Vindacator, Evoker, Fangs(might not work, i don't know why.), Ravager, Skeleton, Stray, Wither, Wither skeleton, Tadpole, All frogs, illusioner, Bat(Based of of new model cause it cool.)
</details>
<details>
<summary>
If you are making your own resource pack that modifies the vanilla textures and want the icons to match your pack, you might want to read this.
</summary>

All that you need to do to make these icons match your pack is to find the texture for the mob you have modified. Make this path in your pack.
```
[pack name]
- assets
 - xaerominimap
  - entity
   - icon
    -sprite
     -[icon you want to modify]
```
Then go to the github and download the icon you want to modify, do whatever to it, then put it in that path, repeat these steps for any other mobs.(Do NOT change the name of the file, otherwise it will NOT work.)
</details>
<details>
<summary>
An announcement
</summary>
Due to recent events, I will be remaking this project from scratch, this will also give some oppertunities to make it way more organized.
</details>
